items.name_cn: 🦋🦋Dior Book Tote Grand-Via Garden

specs.rawTitle: 🦋🦋Dior Book Tote Grand-Via Garden

items.name_cn:
🦋🦋New Arrival
This Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a signature piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Crafted from white fabric and meticulously embellished with multicolor Dior Jardin Botanique embroidery, the romantic floral pattern is inspired by the Grand-Via garden cherished by Monsieur Dior. It accommodates various daily essentials. Small size, featuring a CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS signature on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.
Size: 26cm
Front features CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS signature
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Style No.: 8002
